sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58046" key="kluto/moxqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῠτό-μοχθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n58046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">famous for toil</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Καλλιόπα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">362</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
